title: Summary: Turn 3
content: Pepe memory monitoring system: starts as background thread in AgentTaskRunner, uses LLM to summarize conversation-turn memories when context token utilization exceeds 85% threshold, computes local 256-dim n-gram vectors, filters by cosine similarity, and updates session.selectedMemoryIds for transparent injection into subsequent LLM calls. Implemented as optional PepeService with cooldown, local embedding, and integration via lifecycle hooks.
